meta.title: About - Advanced Battery Concepts
meta.description: Founded in 2009 in Clare, Michigan. Over 17 years building bipolar lead battery technology with 54+ patents, 6 global licensees, and a 99% recyclable product.
meta.og_description: Since 2009, building what others said could not be done. 54+ patents. 6 global licensees. Clare, Michigan.

hero.label: About Advanced Battery Concepts
hero.title: Over 17 Years Building What Others Said Could Not Be Done
hero.desc: Founded in 2009 in Clare, Michigan, Advanced Battery Concepts has spent over a decade and a half proving that bipolar lead battery technology can outperform lithium-ion in the applications that matter most: critical infrastructure in the world's harshest environments.

items.text: Dr. Edward O. Shaffer II founds Advanced Battery Concepts in Clare, Michigan with a vision to commercialize bipolar lead battery technology for large-format energy storage applications.
First GreenSeal® prototype validated, proving that bipolar lead architecture could achieve the energy density, cycle life, and temperature performance required for critical infrastructure deployment.
Key patents granted for bipolar architecture, securing foundational intellectual property protection for ABC's cell design, sealing technology, and manufacturing processes.
Manufacturing 4.0 facility established. Automated production lines for GreenSeal® batteries at the Clare, Michigan headquarters, enabling consistent quality at commercial scale.
EverGreenSeal™ platform launched. Next-generation bipolar lead technology engineered specifically for utility-scale and long-duration energy storage applications.
6 global manufacturing licensees signed, extending ABC's bipolar lead technology to manufacturing partners across multiple continents and markets.
Commercial-scale Battery Barn program initiated. Modular, phased-deployment energy storage systems for municipal utilities and grid infrastructure operators.

ip_portfolio.label: Intellectual Property
ip_portfolio.title: A Portfolio Built to Protect
ip_portfolio.desc: ABC's intellectual property portfolio represents over 17 years of continuous research, development, and engineering, creating barriers to entry that protect our technology and our partners' investments.

manufacturing.label: Manufacturing
manufacturing.title: Built in Michigan. Sourced Domestically.
manufacturing.desc: ABC's manufacturing headquarters in Clare, Michigan houses automated GreenSeal® production lines with domestically sourced materials. Zero Foreign Entity of Concern supply chain risk. Full ITC domestic content eligibility.
manufacturing.heading: Clare, Michigan Facility
manufacturing.text_1: Our Manufacturing 4.0 facility in Clare, Michigan is purpose-built for bipolar lead battery production. Automated stacking, sealing, and filling processes ensure consistent quality across every module that leaves the line.
manufacturing.text_2: Domestic sourcing of all critical materials eliminates the supply chain vulnerabilities and FEOC concerns that plague lithium-ion manufacturers dependent on overseas mineral processing.
manufacturing.image_alt: ABC manufacturing facility producing bipolar lead battery modules

cta.label: Get Started
cta.title: Partner With ABC
cta.desc: Whether you are a utility, developer, integrator, or government agency, we are ready to discuss how ABC technology can solve your toughest energy storage challenges.
